title: Reinventing Entropy | Compression is Intelligence Part 1
summary: 3Blue1Brown presents an animated exploration of entropy and compression as foundational concepts in information theory, drawing on Shannon's mathematical work. The video frames "compression is intelligence" as a conceptual lens and investigates the fundamental compressibility of language through visual demonstrations of information content and entropy.
